examples: Medical supplies are disposed of hygienically.
Carefully wrap the product in a tissue and discard hygienically (not in the toilet).
Plastic trash bags keep waste hygienically contained and allow trash to be collected quickly and safely.
Maybe the BSA really was the hygienically homogenous organization depicted in so many scouting manuals and promotional materials.
My fretting over all of this is not to suggest that we should pass laws to limit what food makers can say, as long as what they say and do is hygienically sound.
